framework.name: Adyen publicly endorsing Verifiable Intent as foundational
framework.description: Adyen CTO Tom Adams gave a public endorsement of Verifiable Intent, positioning it as foundational for agent-initiated transactions. This is Adyen's first concrete public stance on agent commerce architecture — they're backing Mastercard's open standard rather than building proprietary.
framework.raw_quote: As consumers increasingly transact through AI agents, having a verifiable, privacy-preserving way to confirm customer intent becomes foundational. Approaches like Verifiable Intent can help merchants anchor agent-initiated transactions in explicit authorization.

source.title: How Verifiable Intent builds trust in agentic AI commerce - Mastercard
